title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 528.715 - Appointment of commissioners, shall be disinterested and impartial, and not a party to action
text:
528.715.  Appointment of commissioners, shall be disinterested and impartial, and not a party to action. — If the court appoints commissioners under supreme court rule 96, each commissioner, in addition to the requirements and disqualifications applicable to commissioners in supreme court rule 96, shall be disinterested and impartial and not a party to or a participant in the action.
(L. 2019 S.B. 83)
